seo.title: ExploreTECH | Hospitality Technology Marketplace
seo.description: ExploreTECH connects hospitality professionals with trusted technology solutions, industry news, and vendors across the global hospitality market.

headings.howToChoose: How to choose the best technology for your needs
headings.trustedCompanies: Trusted and recognized by renowned global hospitality tech companies.

commitment.title: Committed to serving all hospitality companies throughout the Middle East and Africa.

heroBanner.headingPart2: Your omnichannel for all things hospitality tech
heroBanner.paragraph: Your AI-driven gateway to 2000+ hospitality tech solutions, streamlining the process from discovery to procurement.

promptBox.heading: Ask me anything about hotel TECH

promo.heading: ExploreTECH Launches Native Comparison Tool
promo.description: Our state-of-the-art Product Comparison Tool enables you to compare multiple technologies side by side over a comprehensive list of product features, pricing models, technical specifications, and technology integrations.

howToChoose.title: How to choose the best technology for your needs
howToChoose.description: Choosing technology that fits your goals and integrates with existing solutions is vital. ExploreTECH simplifies the process with AI-powered recommendations, helping you make informed decisions in minutes, not days.
howToChoose.ctaIntro: Get ready to find your perfect fit:

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Browse possibilities by category
discover.bodyDescription: Explore the best solutions across 12 categories. ExploreTECH simplifies your search for the ideal Hotel Management Software, including cloud-based systems.

compare.description: Easily compare hospitality technologies side-by-side. Build your hotel profile and receive tailored solutions that integrate with your systems. Compare features, pricing, specs, and integrations effortlessly.

connect.title: Connect
connect.subtitle: Easily access our services
connect.vendorsDescription: Connect and engage with a growing database of top hospitality tech providers to find the perfect solutions for your business.
connect.expertsDescription: Get in touch with a hospitality technology specialist for expert guidance on optimizing your business or selecting the right technology for your needs.
connect.supportDescription: Enjoy quick access to our wide range of support services.

procure.title: Procure
procure.description: Streamline your RFI/RFP process with our upcoming automated tool. Effortlessly send customized requests to multiple vendors, receive organized proposals, and compare them side-by-side. Save time, reduce costs, and make smarter decisions with confidence.

growingNetwork.title: Our growing network of tech providers
growingNetwork.description: Explore the newest hospitality technology providers who've recently joined our platform. These forward-thinking vendors bring fresh innovations and specialized solutions to help hoteliers enhance their tech stack and stay ahead in a competitive market.

trustedCompanies.title: Trusted and recognized by renowned global hospitality tech companies.

latestNews.title: Latest News
latestNews.description: Stay informed with the latest and most relevant news from ExploreTECH and our featured hospitality industry experts.

earlyAdopters.title: ExploreTECH Early Adopters
earlyAdopters.description: We are immensely thankful to the visionary technology brands who, as early adopters, have played a crucial role in validating ExploreTECH's value proposition right from the outset.

newsletter.heading: Keep up with the latest industry news & trends.
newsletter.subheading: Subscribe to Our Newsletter to Stay Informed.
